# PRP — charter-auto-extract

## Users

Solo developers and small teams using pipelinekit who have existing analysis and plan documents but no charter yet.

## Problem

Existing workflow requires the full 9-topic discovery loop even when relevant context already exists in prior workflow artifacts, wasting time.

## Success Criteria

- Auto-extract produces a recognizable draft charter in < 1 second
- Users can accept, edit, or start fresh discovery from one prompt
- No existing charter is ever overwritten
